{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

## The Probability Density Function (PDF)  {.smaller}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-pdf.qmd >}}

## The Cumulative Distribution Function (CDF)

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-CDF.qmd >}}

## The Survival Function

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-survf.qmd >}}

## The Hazard Function

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-haz.qmd >}}

## The Cumulative Hazard Function

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-cuhaz.qmd >}}

## Some Key Mathematical Relationships among Survival Concepts

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-surv-relationships.qmd >}}

## Likelihood with censoring

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-likelihood-with-censoring.qmd >}}
